message:
✨ Always show recommendations + analytics + mission normalizer (#1493)

- matcher.ts: Accept null cluster, baseline engagement scoring, min score 1
- MissionBrowser.tsx: normalizeMission() converts kc-mission-v1 nested format to flat MissionExport
- MissionBrowser.tsx: Remove if(cluster) guards so recommendations always appear
- analytics.ts: Add solution browser events (search, browse, view, import, github link)
- MissionBrowser.tsx: Wire analytics events to all user interactions

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
